holdings.infoBox: PPA is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Aerospace stock at 8.84%, The Boeing Company at 8.69%, RTX Corporation at 7.10%, Lockheed Martin at 6.24%, and General Dynamics at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Invesco Aerospace & Defense ETF (PPA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SPADE Defense index, a market-cap-weighted index of US-listed stocks involved in the defense, military, homeland security and space industries. PPA was launched on Oct 26, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
